### exit 1
### stdout
### stderr
stow dir is $SANDBOX/stow
stow dir path relative to target $SANDBOX/target is ../stow
Planning stow of: pkg ...
Planning stow of package pkg...
    level of f is 0
CONFLICT when stowing pkg: cannot stow ../stow/pkg/f over existing target f since neither a link nor a directory and --adopt not specified
Planning stow of package pkg... done
WARNING! stowing pkg would cause conflicts:
  * cannot stow ../stow/pkg/f over existing target f since neither a link nor a directory and --adopt not specified
All operations aborted.
### tree
dir  home
dir  stow
dir  stow/pkg
file stow/pkg/f 0644 ca978112ca1bbdcafac231b39a23dc4da786eff8147c4e72b9807785afee48bb
dir  target
file target/f 0644 3e23e8160039594a33894f6564e1b1348bbd7a0088d42c4acb73eeaed59c009d
